原名《重生：我的女友是个偏执狂》

　　谢述对苏浅忆十年不离不弃的追求，在他的人生最后关头依旧没等到对方的回复，他觉得自己这辈子活的很失败，在闭眼前一刻，却还是有那么一个意想不到的人会因为他的离开而悲痛欲绝。

　　他当时就想，要是能再选择一次，他一定不会再喜欢苏浅忆。

　　再次睁眼，重返校园时代，让他有了第二次机会。

　　这次，谢述清楚认识到了自己的内心，开始和苏浅忆保持距离，并主靠近那个默默在他身后陪伴了很久的人。

　　——

　　当苏浅忆从别人的口中得知谢述在追别人时，她连忙跑去确认，然后刚好看到你恩我爱的两人，当场生气：“谢述！我们相识这么多年的感情算什么！”

　　谢述语气淡定：“算我倒霉吧。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e14f0fa7b559241832c78da8ca96fb1c","author":"枯枯木逢春","author_id":"","book_id":"7233096671276567589","book_name":"在外冷冰冰的校花回家后又乖又甜","book_short_name":"以深情共白头","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0c8c8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7233096770866119202","read_count":"22161","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1108992"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"546","tags":"都市日常,都市,重生,校花,单女主,1v1,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/36dd9c41d31562996734041286d855cd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779309787&x-signature=0xm8QA1Yin68grlXyj21S8aHiFk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1412192566515344","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.757617e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322044307EA1634AD1B580A53451D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":53,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4757,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":57919},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1685626881,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7299062830627521330","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这小说恋爱观很正。
男主的恋爱观真的超棒的，喜欢一个人就一直喜欢，你若不离不弃，我必生死相依。
在男主确定关系后就是，愿得一人心，白首不相离。
男主在和女主在一起之后，也没和别人搞暧昧，面对以前喜欢的人，当断就断，一点都不拖泥带水，超帅的。
有女朋友的时候，面对向自己表白的人，先委婉拒绝，又直接拒绝，后直接删好友，简直酷毙了。
剧情可能有点慢，但真不是在水文，一直在发糖，搞得我又开始相信爱情了。","text_exts":[{"e":46,"s":42,"text":"生死相依","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%94%9F%E6%AD%BB%E7%9B%B8%E4%BE%9D&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741257870A53451D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227299062830627521330%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227233096671276567589%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%94%9F%E6%AD%BB%E7%9B%B8%E4%BE%9D%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1699446406,"group_id":"7233096671276567589","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"往生堂主，天下第一。。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7x8JBgGlXyCspGVZt7mc3lo6gdUi7ZzXI71lrX5kJux","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7c285bdf7b224071a726974579f02c67~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705137&x-signature=uL7xmXEKsSgaiN%2F%2FpOr%2BeaGQE7E%3D","user_id":"2771220548028407","user_name":"嗷嗷芝麻胡"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2771220548028407","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7233096671276567589","book_info":{"abstract":"【单女主+追夫火葬场+非病娇+无系统无金手指+普普通通恋爱日常】

　　他当时就想，要是能再选择一次，他一定不会再喜欢苏浅忆。

　　再次睁眼，重返校园时代，让他有了第二次机会。

　　这次，谢述清楚认识到了自己的内心，开始和苏浅忆保持距离，并主靠近那个默默在他身后陪伴了很久的人。

　　谢述语气淡定：“算我倒霉吧。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e14f0fa7b559241832c78da8ca96fb1c","author":"枯枯木逢春","author_id":"","book_id":"7233096671276567589","book_name":"在外冷冰冰的校花回家后又乖又甜","book_short_name":"以深情共白头","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0c8c8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7233096770866119202","read_count":"22161","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1108992"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"546","tags":"都市日常,都市,重生,校花,单女主,1v1,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/36dd9c41d31562996734041286d855cd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779309787&x-signature=0xm8QA1Yin68grlXyj21S8aHiFk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1412192566515344","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.7349372e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322044307EA1634AD1B580A53451D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读28小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":16,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":63849,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":101596,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":10163},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7366633994623746841","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"（在床上想了半天，我还是回来写总结啦）
  这本书跟现实没联系吧其实很多都跟现实对的上，包括甜甜的恋爱，很多恋爱的开始都是最美好的瞬间，蓄谋已久的表白，在一起后明天都想腻在一起的样子都是现实对照（我以前也有过类似的经历，可惜没有后续）
  但毕竟是小说嘛，男主跟很多人一样，爱闹，爱开玩笑，有一群好朋友……女主说白了就是没病，只是占有欲强一点而已
  故事线很清晰，不杂，基本都是围绕主角写
  我很喜欢女二的结局，不当舔狗也不再喜欢别人，人生都有遗憾，我在陌生的城市，就像以前那样你希望我过得幸福，现在我希望你能一直幸福……","text_exts":[{"e":51,"s":46,"text":"甜甜的恋爱","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%94%9C%E7%94%9C%E7%9A%84%E6%81%8B%E7%88%B1&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741257870A53451D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227366633994623746841%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227233096671276567589%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%94%9C%E7%94%9C%E7%9A%84%E6%81%8B%E7%88%B1%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1715180487,"group_id":"7233096671276567589","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"“假装”才是最致命的刀","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/cOTO7Wr6OC5WTe426l6hbvAttrXX3jcONCQZnNysfJ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3b7670fc169e40bf8752230228b53a9f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706399&x-signature=tvCT4M74qcANSBayXqkksNb65%2FI%3D","user_id":"1698070555551758","user_name":"玖恩玖阿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1698070555551758","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7233096671276567589","book_info":{"abstract":"【单女主+追夫火葬场+非病娇+无系统无金手指+普普通通恋爱日常】
